ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the poll */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the poll */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollster who conducted the poll */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sponsor of the poll */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of respondents in the sample */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population from which the sample was drawn */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation of the respondents */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the poll */,
  "tracking" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the poll is tracking or not */,
  "text" TEXT /* The actual question asked in the poll */,
  "approve" INTEGER /* Number of respondents who approve */,
  "disapprove" INTEGER /* Number of respondents who disapprove */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the full report of the poll */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the poll */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the poll */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level for the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_pollster_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollster_id") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_subject FOREIGN KEY ("subject") REFERENCES poll_subjects ("subject_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollsters" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollster organization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the pollster */,
  "reputation_score" REAL /* Reputation score of the pollster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsor (e.g., organization, individual) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the sponsor */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided by the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll associated with the response */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the respondent */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the respondent */,
  "approve" INTEGER /* Approval response from the respondent */,
  "disapprove" INTEGER /* Disapproval response from the respondent */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the respondent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the respondent */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll associated with the rating */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the approval rating */,
  "approve_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents approving */,
  "disapprove_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents disapproving */,
  "undecided_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of undecided respondents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_ratings_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the subject (e.g., politics, social issues) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracking_polls" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll associated with tracking status */,
  "tracking_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the poll is a tracking poll */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tracking poll */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tracking poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_polls_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the poll type (e.g., opinion poll, tracking poll) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the poll type */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the poll type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "analysis_text" TEXT /* Content of the analysis report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., poll, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll associated with the analysis */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the analysis */,
  "positive_count" INTEGER /* Number of positive responses */,
  "negative_count" INTEGER /* Number of negative responses */,
  "neutral_count" INTEGER /* Number of neutral responses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll associated with the analysis */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_analysis_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll associated with the analysis */,
  "demographic_group" TEXT /* Demographic group (e.g., age, gender) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_analysis_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)
